overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating through a futuristic neon-lit city. The character descends from an elevated walkway, crosses a busy intersection, cuts through a narrow back alley, and emerges onto a main street beneath towering skyscrapers and holographic advertisements on a bright sunny day.

scene_state.functional_zone: elevated street corner with pedestrian crosswalk

events.description: character crosses the yellow-striped crosswalk as a green truck passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: descending stairs and walking across the intersection toward the food stalls

notable_agents.action: green cargo truck driving across the intersection from right to left

entered.detail: large red digital billboard displaying 'WILD THING' advertisement on building facade
towering futuristic buildings with holographic advertisements and neon signage
traditional red lanterns hanging on wires across the street
illuminated 'HOTEL' sign on green building facade
broad pedestrian crossing with thick yellow stripes

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a sunlit cyberpunk street corner with towering glass skyscrapers covered in holographic ads. The character descends from an elevated position and crosses a wide intersection marked by yellow stripes, passing red paper lanterns strung overhead while a green cargo truck drives past on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk with outdoor barber shop and vending machines

events.description: character turns right onto the sidewalk, moving away from the main intersection
character enters a narrow alleyway between green industrial buildings

agents.ego_description: turning onto the sidewalk and walking past outdoor seating toward a narrow alley entrance

notable_agents.action: person sitting in barber chair outside the shop, getting a haircut

entered.detail: pair of blue automated vending machines with barber pole graphics
open-air barber setup with chairs and mirrors on the sidewalk
blue and white food vendor cart with umbrella
narrow opening between buildings leading to a service passage

segments.scene_description: The character turns right onto a sidewalk lined with a green building featuring blue vending machines and an outdoor barber shop where a patron sits in a chair. The camera passes trash bags and food stalls before approaching and entering a narrow alleyway entrance between industrial walls.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow service alley with descending stairs and vending machines

events.description: character descends a flight of concrete stairs into the lower alley section
lighting shifts from shadowed alley to brighter exit as character approaches the street

agents.ego_description: navigating down stairs through a tight alleyway, passing vending machines and graffiti walls

notable_agents.action: child standing near the vending machines at the bottom of the stairs

entered.detail: tight concrete walls with industrial piping and graffiti on both sides
pair of red and orange automated vending machines with glowing displays
wall covered in red and white spray paint tags and street art
green neon arrow sign pointing left on the wall
blue garbage bags and cardboard boxes piled against the wall

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow, shadowed service alley between tall concrete walls covered in graffiti. They descend a flight of stairs past red vending machines and trash bags, encountering a child NPC near the bottom, before approaching the brighter exit back to the main street.

scene_state.functional_zone: downtown street beneath elevated walkways and neon signage

events.description: character exits the narrow alley back onto the main street with wide open space
camera tilts upward to look at the towering buildings and overpasses overhead

agents.ego_description: walking along the street while looking up at the towering architecture and neon signs overhead

entered.detail: large pink and blue neon sign reading 'HOテル' spanning across the street
massive digital advertisement showing a boxer with championship belt
elevated pedestrian walkway and highway structure casting shadows on the street
vertical neon sign with Japanese characters reading 'カラオケ'
futuristic vehicles parked along the curb beneath the overpass

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the alley, the character enters a sunlit downtown street dominated by massive neon signs including a prominent 'HOテル' sign and digital billboards. The camera pans upward to reveal the impressive verticality of the city, with elevated walkways and towering skyscrapers covered in holographic advertisements while futuristic cars are parked along the shadowed curb.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a bright, open intersection through a shadowed urban corridor and back into the towering verticality of a neon-lit downtown. It begins on a sunlit street corner where the character descends from an elevated position, crossing a wide intersection beneath red paper lanterns as a green cargo truck passes by. The camera then turns right along a sidewalk lined with blue vending machines and an outdoor barber shop, moving past food stalls before narrowing into a dim service alley. As the character descends a flight of stairs past graffiti-covered concrete walls and red vending machines, the scene shifts from deep shadow toward a bright exit. Finally, the character emerges back onto a sunlit main street dominated by massive digital billboards and a prominent hotel sign, with the camera panning upward to reveal the immense height of the surrounding skyscrapers and elevated walkways.
